title: Combining Reducers with Context
description: Manage complex state with useReducer and provide it via Context.

slides.title: Why Reducer + Context? 🔄
slides.content:
# Scaling State Logic

When state becomes complex (multiple sub‑values, complex transitions), `useReducer` can be cleaner than multiple `useState` calls. Combine it with Context to provide both state and dispatch to deep components.

This pattern is a lightweight alternative to Redux.

slides.title: Creating a Reducer Context
Consuming the Reducer Context

quizData.question: What is a benefit of combining useReducer with Context?

options.text: It centralises state logic and provides dispatch to deep components

quizData.explanation: This pattern centralises state transitions (reducer) and makes dispatch available anywhere via Context.
